company.DefaultInvoiceMailMessage:
Tack för att ni har valt att jobba med oss på Structsales!

Här kommer era betalningsuppgifter. Fakturan bifogas som PDF.

Consequences.Title: Potential breach of the book-keeping Act
Consequences.Description: The bookkeeping regulations require that all business transactions be recorded within 50 days after the end of the month. To ensure compliance with these regulations, we need to receive and approve all accounting documents and invoices for the period, even if their due dates are later. Click the button above to see what needs attention. If there are delays in receiving these documents, we cannot guarantee timely completion of the bookkeeping, which could result in non-compliance with the law.

Consequences.Title: Impact on Cash Flow - inaccurate VAT report
Consequences.Description: We cannot report VAT for documents we do not receive. If documents are missing, it can affect VAT reporting, potentially leading to you paying more VAT to the tax authorities than necessary. This can negatively impact your cash flow until the documents are submitted. The amount is a rough estimate based on the sum of your missing outbound payments.

Consequences.Title: VAT correction might be needed
Consequences.Description: The missing documentation can have a significant impact on the VAT. It may mean that the VAT report needs to be corrected retrospectively for you to comply with tax regulations and thus avoid fines. Since this correction requires additional work on our part, we will need to charge a fee for the extra effort involved.
